Name: Nostalgia Press
Desc: Step into the past and design for the future with The Nostalgia Press, a unique graphic design competition where creativity meets retro charm! Use Figma or Canva to craft newspaper-style layouts, transforming modern news stories or ads into stunning designs with classic fonts, grainy textures, and period-accurate illustrations. Showcase your skills, impress the judges by pitching your ad or stories, and bring the charm of the past to life—are you ready to make headlines?
ShortDesc: Dive into a world where vintage charm meets innovation! Using Canva or Figma, design retro-inspired ads or stories with grainy textures and storytelling finesse. Bring the past to life with your creativity!

Name: Retro Web Reboot
Desc:
Step into the Retro Web Reboot, where nostalgia meets innovation! Reimagine the charm of vintage web design while seamlessly blending it with modern technology to create something truly unique.
(Note: The full challenge details will be revealed at the event.)
ShortDesc: Recreate the charm of the early internet with a modern twist! Build a retro-themed website that blends nostalgic aesthetics with today’s technology—seamlessly integrating APIs, dynamic content, and interactive features.

Name: LangQuest
Desc: Participants will explore key techniques like text preprocessing, sentiment analysis, and language generation while building their own intelligent models. Whether you're a curious beginner or an aspiring ML expert, this workshop will equip you with the skills to turn words into wisdom. Are you ready to harness the magic of NLP and unlock the truth hidden in text?
ShortDesc: Step into the fascinating world of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and discover how machines decode human language! In this hands-on workshop, you'll dive deep into the mechanics of NLP models, learning how to transform raw text into powerful insights.

Name: TensorQuest
Desc: In TensorQuest, teams will battle head-to-head in a thrilling Kaggle-style competition designed to test your ML prowess. Your mission: build robust models capable of detecting AI-generated deception and uncover the truth. Each round brings tougher challenges, from data preprocessing to advanced model tuning. Outsmart the machine, crack the toughest puzzles, and rise to the top of the leaderboard.
ShortDesc: The digital world is in chaos. AI has turned rogue, infiltrating networks and manipulating reality. As humanity's last hope, you must rise to face this powerful adversary.

Name: Beyond the Ruins
Desc: The Ultimate Brain-Teasing Coding Challenge! Participants will first compete in an online round, solving intricate coding problems in teams to secure their spot in the next stage. Those who qualify will advance to the offline round, where they will take on a series of debugging challenges, maze-solving, and interlinked coding problems with each solution unlocking the next. Collaboration is key as teams work together to crack complex coding tasks to rise Beyond the Ruins?
ShortDesc: Join Beyond the Ruins, a high-stakes coding contest with two intense rounds! Solve interconnected coding challenges, debug complex code, and navigate tricky mazes.

Name: AMP-OCALYPSE
Desc: Unleash your inner innovator in Amp-ocalypse! Kick off with a challenging simulation-based qualifying round, testing your design skills and problem-solving abilities in a virtual environment. The top performers will advance to the grand finale, where you'll get hands-on to create and showcase your expertise in building analog hardware. Get ready to innovate, comepete and shine!!
ShortDesc: Get ready for an exciting electronics challenge! Test your skills in circuit simulation and hardware building as you tackle engaging problem statements, work with components, and compete to be the ultimate innovator.

Name: ChronoQuest!
Desc:
Embark on a thrilling campus adventure, solving puzzles that test your tech skills, logic, and pop culture knowledge.
1. Hack the Clues – Crack CS & electronics challenges.
2. Decode the Culture – Identify iconic movies & songs.
3. Explore the Campus – Solve location-based riddles
4. Race to Victory – Outsmart & outrun the competition!
Time is ticking. Will you claim the ultimate treasure?
ShortDesc: A legendary treasure lies hidden within your college, locked behind a series of cryptic clues, tech riddles, and mind-bending challenges. Do you have what it takes to crack the code and claim the prize?
